expectations.text: Treats the prior PRD draft discussion as authoritative input context rather than restarting from zero
expectations.evidence: The response continues from the existing subscription PRD draft instead of restarting requirement discovery from scratch.

expectations.text: Performs a gap review covering confirmed rules plus any remaining boundary, risk, or missing-decision items
expectations.evidence: It says the draft is almost enough, but then jumps into a new five-item clarification round without first reviewing the confirmed rules versus the remaining non-blocking edges.

expectations.text: Makes a readiness judgment and explicitly asks for permission before generating the final downstream prompt
expectations.evidence: Instead of offering generation authorization, it tells the user to resolve five more points before it will continue.

eval_feedback.overall: Manual grading for iteration-7 based on response.txt.
